hero.title: Master
hero.desc: Comprehensive online learning platform with HSK 1-6 roadmaps. AI pronunciation practice, smart Flashcards, and high-quality video lectures.

features.whyUsDesc: Modern learning methods combined with AI technology help you remember vocabulary 300% longer than traditional methods.

hsk.title: Standard HSK Roadmap
hsk.desc: Lessons are designed closely following the latest HSK curricula from HSK 1 to HSK 6.

library.title: Massive Library
library.desc: Over 5000 video lectures, 10,000 flashcards, and a rich repository of practice exams.

community.title: Vibrant Community
community.desc: Connect with thousands of other students and compete in weekly rankings.

lesson.title: Lesson
lesson.sampleDesc: In this lesson, we will take the first steps on the journey to master Chinese. You will learn how to pronounce basic initials and finals, and how to greet others politely.
goalItems: Know how to greet people socially
lesson.notFoundDesc: The lesson you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.

quiz.testKnowledge: Test your knowledge of the current topic.
quiz.noQuestions: No quiz questions available for this lesson.
